title: Throwing Spear
description: Throwing spear is a traditional weapon in Vietnam and it's now in Minecraft! You can now allow to get a mace-throwing spear making you look more cool! Credit to : D. Trong Khazg for creating the model!
body: Throwing spear is a traditional weapon in Vietnam and it's now in Minecraft! You can now allow to get a mace-throwing spear making you look more cool! Credit to : D. Trong Khazg for creating the model!
